message:
feat(engine): extend e2e harness with Baseline, Differential, and Chaos scenarios

Expands the end-to-end test harness with three new scenario types:

src/e2e_harness.rs (+102):
- Baseline scenario: Establishes performance/correctness baselines
  for regression detection across engine versions
- Differential scenario: Runs same input through two engine configs
  and asserts output equivalence within tolerance
- Chaos scenario: Injects controlled failures (dropped messages,
  delayed responses, corrupted payloads) to verify resilience

tests/e2e_harness.rs (+161):
- Integration tests exercising all three new scenario types
- Scenario composition tests verifying they can be combined in
  a single test run
- Edge cases for scenario configuration validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
